title: MAINTAINER: hook execution failure logging omits stderr, hard to debug
description: In main.rs, when on_message_hook runs and fails, we log 'hook failed: {e}' but the hook's stderr is captured in HookResult.stderr and never logged or emitted. If a user's script breaks, they get a cryptic 'hook failed' event on stdout with zero detail about why. The stderr sits in memory and is discarded. In 6 months when a user reports 'my hook stopped working', the maintainer won't be able to diagnose why without adding logging. Fix: emit ScriptOutput with both stdout AND stderr visible, or log stderr at warn level when exit code \!= 0.
